name: quioteframework/db-cycle
description: Cycle ORM driver adapter for Quiote's database layer.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/db-cycle/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here. NOTE: this package's own autoload-dev is inert while installed as a path-repo dependency of the monorepo -- composer only loads a dependency's `autoload` section, never its `autoload-dev` (that's why the monorepo's own root composer.json duplicates the Quiote\Test\Database\Entity\ mapping in ITS autoload-dev). This section only takes effect once this package is tested standalone after the real split.
